subcodes.first_line: Thou dost observe how the Light of Truth hath illumined both East and West, and how the Candle of Iran hath brightened those distant lands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ملاحظه مينمائی که نور حقيقت شرق و غرب را روشن نموده شمع ايران آن ممالک بعيده را منوّر کرده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rejection of Muhammad, @power of the Manifestation of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
